_comment: RAG tier configuration. Copy and customize for your project. See README.md § Tier configuration for format docs.

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.description: Framework/CMS reference — hooks, APIs, services, patterns

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.description: Per-project source code and project-specific configuration

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: Cross-cutting gotchas, bugs, and non-obvious fixes across all stacks

tiers.label: Tier 4
tiers.description: Infrastructure reference: Docker, k8s, nginx, SSL (platform-agnostic)

tiers.label: Tier 5
tiers.description: OS-specific reference: package names, firewall rules, SELinux, distro-specific fixes
